brand_promise: Priorizar una promesa central, un codigo visual reconocible y una secuencia de contenido que convierta atencion en accion.
perception_angle: Perception first: make value felt before it is explained.
premium_positioning: Premium positioning through restraint, coherence, and emotional precision.
visual_authority: Build visual authority with hierarchy, negative space, contrast, and repeatable codes.
tagline: La marca tiene una base aprovechable; el mayor valor esta en convertir senales en sistema.
brand_descriptor: Las fuentes muestran senales utiles, pero el sistema debe separar identidad, percepcion visual, narrativa y conversion para operar con precision.

identity_sections.name: Logo principal
identity_sections.description: Marca madre como senal inmediata de reconocimiento.

identity_sections.name: Variantes
identity_sections.description: Versiones flat, monocromo, icono y aplicacion digital.

identity_sections.name: Aplicaciones
identity_sections.description: Instagram, WhatsApp Business, web, propuesta y materiales comerciales.

logo_system.primary: Use current primary logo as the main recognition asset.
logo_system.icon: Use or derive a simplified symbol from the most recognizable brand mark.

typography.usage: Use strong hierarchy for titles and restrained supporting text for details.

brand_tone.name: Diferenciacion
brand_tone.description: Convertir atributos genericos en codigos propietarios: rituales, lenguaje, visuales y experiencia.

brand_tone.name: Premium confidence
brand_tone.description: Sound curated, specific, and operational rather than generic.

tone_cards.name: Precise
tone_cards.description: Use language that removes ambiguity and supports premium perception.

tone_cards.name: Atmospheric
tone_cards.description: Let the brand transmit feeling before over-explaining the offer.

tone_cards.name: Authoritative
tone_cards.description: Make every claim concrete through assets, proof, and visual order.

fundamental_values.name: Identidad
fundamental_values.description: Revelar la esencia real y hacerla reconocible.

fundamental_values.name: Percepcion
fundamental_values.description: Elevar el valor sentido antes de explicar la oferta.

fundamental_values.name: Emocion
fundamental_values.description: Crear deseo, confianza y memoria emocional.

fundamental_values.name: Autenticidad
fundamental_values.description: Construir desde verdad, no desde decoracion.

fundamental_values.name: Experiencia
fundamental_values.description: Convertir cada contacto en una senal de marca.

applications.name: Digital presence
applications.description: Apply the identity consistently across website, social profile, and sales material.

applications.name: Client proposal
applications.description: Translate the identity into offer pages, highlights, and proof points.

digital_applications.name: Foto perfil Instagram
digital_applications.description: Icono simple, reconocible y legible en pequeno.

digital_applications.name: WhatsApp Business
digital_applications.description: Perfil comercial con promesa clara, beneficios y horario visible.

digital_applications.name: Favicon / web
digital_applications.description: Sistema compacto para presencia digital coherente.

instagram_style.description: Demostrar criterio, metodo y dominio de la categoria.
Convertir el destino o servicio en una experiencia deseable, no solo en itinerario.
Reducir incertidumbre con evidencia, casos, testimonios y proceso.
Guiar al publico hacia consulta, reserva, compra o diagnostico.

feed_system.name: Promesa
feed_system.description: Posts que hacen tangible el valor principal.

feed_system.name: Experiencia
feed_system.description: Escenas que muestran el resultado emocional.

feed_system.name: Prueba
feed_system.description: Evidencia, proceso, testimonios y detalle operativo.

feed_system.name: Conversion
feed_system.description: Piezas directas para reserva, consulta o compra.

commercial_offer.title: Signature Experience
commercial_offer.promise: Priorizar una promesa central, un codigo visual reconocible y una secuencia de contenido que convierta atencion en accion.

benefits.name: Sharper perception
benefits.description: Help the audience understand the value faster.

benefits.name: Reusable system
benefits.description: Turn scattered ideas into rules that can guide future assets.

footer_claim: Designed to make the brand easier to feel, trust, remember, and choose.
